calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Daysi Alvarado is present.
Attorney, Matthew Gale, appearing for the plaintiff through limited scope.
Defendant, James McDonald, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Norman Nayfach, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-23-2010 is vacated.
